data.seoDesc: Binance will end the Usual (USUAL) Pre-Market at 2024-12-17 09:00 (UTC) and open spot trading for the following pairs at 2024-12-18 11:00 (UTC).

For more information, please click here. Digital asset prices are subject to high market risk and price volatility. The value of your investment may go down or up, and you may not get back the amount invested. You are solely responsible for your investment decisions and Binance is not liable for any losses you may incur. Past performance is not a reliable predictor of future performance. You should only invest in products you are familiar with and where you understand the risks. You should carefully consider your investment experience, financial situation, investment objectives and risk tolerance and consult an independent financial adviser prior to making any investment. This material should not be construed as financial advice. Spot trading services are provided by Nest Exchange Limited, which is a Recognised Investment Exchange in the Abu Dhabi Global Market and is an exchange authorised and regulated by the Financial Services Regulatory Authority. For the avoidance of doubt, this announcement is an Exchange Notice for the purposes of Binance’s Exchange Rules. For more information, see our Terms of Use and Risk Warning.
